category_sources: Official DocFX documentation describes building technical documentation sites from .NET assembly metadata, XML comments, Swagger, and Markdown.
source_facts.description: Tools for building and publishing API documentation for .NET projects.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub repository brand the project as DocFX/docfx.
docs_sources: Official DocFX documentation site hosted by the dotnet organization.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/dotnet/docfx; per instruction, returned repo as null.
tags_sources: Official DocFX docs describe converting .NET metadata, XML comments, Swagger, and Markdown into documentation.
